name: Sorry Cake
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Shredded Wheat, broken into shreds
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Sift together the flour, baking soda, and salt.
3. Beat the shortening with the butter until well combined.
4. Cream in the sugar and beat until fluffy and light.
5. Beat in the egg yolks one at a time until well combined.
6. Add the flour mixture alternately with the buttermilk, beginning and ending with the flour. Stir in the orange zest, cereal, cranberries, and pecans.
7. Beat the cream of tartar into the egg whites and continue beating until stiff.
8. Gently fold the whites into the cake batter.
9. Pour into three greased 8-inch or 9-inch round cake pans.
10. Bake for 25-35 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center tests clean.
11. Cool on wire rack.
12. Frosting: Beat the cream cheese with the butter until well combined. Gradually add the confectioners' sugar and orange juice; beat until creamy and smooth. Stir in the orange zest. Frost the tops and sides of the cake.
